reference: WHEN IT WAS OVER THE MAN ASKED DICKIE IF HE COULD WALK A LITTLE WAY AND WHEN DICKIE SAID HE COULD THEY SET OUT IN THE MOST FRIENDLY WAY SIDE BY SIDE
text: When it was over, the men asked Dickie if he could walk a little way, and when Dickie said he could, they set out in the most friendly way, side by side.
